1.0.38.title: Security Hardening, Demo Mode & Quality of Life
notes: Upload security: per-user rate limiting (10/min, 30/hr), 500-image quota, magic-byte file validation, and disk-space guard
Registration anti-spam: in-memory rate limiter blocks more than 5 sign-up attempts per IP per hour
IP address now captured in login logs at registration time, not only on first login
IP detection updated to respect Cloudflare Tunnel and Traefik headers (CF-Connecting-IP takes priority)
One active session per account — signing in from a new device invalidates all previous sessions
Demo Mode — admins can enable a banner shown to all users indicating the instance is a demo
Admin: bulk select in User Management — approve, lock, or delete multiple accounts at once
Password visibility toggle (eye icon) on login, register, and admin password-change forms
User Management panel fully responsive on mobile with card-style layout
Mobile grid slider now works correctly from 2 columns upward
Session Management options moved to the Authentication settings tab
Signup Notifications section moved above Registration Controls in Authentication settings

1.0.37.title: Landing Page, Logo & Auth Improvements
notes: Redesigned landing page with updated copy, stat strip, and Coming Soon overlay on pricing
Shared app logo component — upload a custom logo or use the default icon app-wide
Default SVG favicon matches the app's primary colour
Login and register pages now show the app logo instead of a generic icon
Fixed auth redirect loop — landing page no longer requires sign-in
Sign-in page features the landing navbar with Get Started button
Wider login form on desktop for better readability
Portfolio Value Trend chart tooltip now readable on dark backgrounds
Price event toast notifications now auto-dismiss after 8 seconds
Release notes modal — trigger from Settings › Data at any time
Discord notifications for new user registrations and pending approvals
Admin: Sign Out All Users — invalidates all active sessions with optional message

1.0.11.title: Notifications, Analytics & More
notes: Toast notifications for price events — persistent alerts when cards hit new highs or price changes
In-app notification polling every 30 seconds
Admin analytics dashboard with per-user stats, genre breakdown, and activity charts
IP login logging with history — admins can now view the last 10 logins per user
Accounts and pending approvals merged into a single unified panel
Auto-deny setting now uses a clear day-based dropdown instead of raw hours
Recently added cards in row view now paginate at 4 per page
Mobile settings save bar now spans full screen width
